entry.title: Re: Identify a TR with the Fiori App

entry.title: Re: Planning Strategy 10 vs Planning Strategy 30 in MTS

entry.title: Re: Welcome Touchpoint - Building side-by-side extensions on SAP BTP

A lot of steps mentioned in answer section here should have been part of learning journey .

This will only discourage new learners from finding the otherwise good content.

entry.title: Re: how to use discover api - cloud integration
entry.content:
you can use the police or u can create your own polices .

once your are deployed your API you will get the API URL with that you can call your API with CPI.

Flow will be like.

SENDER--> CPI ---> API.

entry.title: When migrating sales order data by Migrate Your Data-Migration Cockpit app.The following warning
entry.content:
Hello.
Is it possible to set the following for the price on the sales order?
When create sales order,
-PPR0 is cannot changed
-To register manual prices, set for PMP0
-If both PPR0 and PMP0 are not present, an error occurs until billing

entry.title: When migrating sales order data by Migrate Your Data-Migration Cockpit app.The following warning
entry.content:
Is the job date function handled by Server-Based or User-Based?
I couldn't tell from the HelpPortal description below.
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/a630d57fc5004c6383e7a81efee7a8bb/6164ef91c48240d4959b63fe205aec3f.html?locale=en-US

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA - Composite Roles in launchpad content and layout tools
entry.content:
Hi @frederick_vrolant 

This change is about giving greater choice to companies with complex security authorization needs. 

The reasons for this and the best practices approaches suggested if you want to composite roles are explained in the blog post.  

You can still single roles if that meets your needs. 

Most roles delivered by SAP are single roles but there are a few composite roles, such as the Fiori Foundation Admin role and Fiori Foundation User role. 

And yes you can federate composite roles to SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition - that was already possible.

Hope that helps

Jocelyn

entry.title: Re: ABAP Restful Application Programming : Custom actions => Merge Draft entities into Active and
entry.content:
Regarding the error "Error while requesting side effects - Error: Expected 1 row(s), but instead saw 0 Error: Expected 1 row(s), but instead saw 0"  : We opened a ticket and got this answer:

"Based on this I would like to inform, the fix is available from UI5 version 1.121. It is further improved in UI5 1.124 onwards. However, for UI5 1.108, which is your concerned version, the fix could not be made.
If it is not feasible, I would also mention again the 2nd suggestion of adding a SideEffects annotation which requests for messages (We also have an alternate suggestion to unblock you. It would be possible to avoid the SideEffects request to the entity which has been discarded by explicitly having a SideEffects annotation on the concerned action which requests for messages. This can be introduced to unblock you while a proper fix is made.). This can help you mitigate the symptoms of the issue until you decide to update to 1.121 or later."

So following annotation helped us:

<Annotations Target="SAP__self.writeBoMChanges(SAP__self.StrucHeaderType)">
    <Annotation Term="com.sap.vocabularies.Common.v1.SideEffects" Qualifier="writeBoMChanges">
        <Record>
            <PropertyValue Property="TargetEntities">
                <Collection>
                    <NavigationPropertyPath>/SAP__self.Container/StrucHeader</NavigationPropertyPath>
                </Collection>
            </PropertyValue>
        </Record>
    </Annotation>
</Annotations>

entry.title: Accounts Receivable aging report - Running reports takes about 10 minutes for one company code
entry.content:
Hello,

One of our customers having below queries on Account Receivables: 

1. AR aging a. Running reports takes about 10 minutes for one company code

a. Can we schedule the aging to run every night?

b. Not enough info on the basic aging so we had to customize. We’ve added a column for Invoice number, Customer PO number and payment terms.

c. Partial payments does not net the invoice remaining balance. E.g if the customer short pays for tax or discount, SAP aging will show 2 lines : the original invoice amount of a dollar 1000 and payment line of -dollar990. 1. Customer payment functionality specifically with credit card payments. We would like to know more about this functionalities

entry.title: Re: SAP CPI - Encryption and Decryption using PGP keys
entry.content:
Is there a way to use PGP keys which contains "<" and ">" in the User ID? In my case the SAP Concur public key contains these chars in the User ID:

But PGP encrypter says:

Currently it looks like I can't use SAP tools with SAP tools. 😉

entry.title: Re: Speical characters in PGP key user id not allowing in...
entry.content:
I have the same issue. In my case the SAP Concur public key contains these chars in the User ID:

But PGP encrypter says:

Currently it looks like I can't use SAP tools with SAP tools. 😉

entry.title: UOM KG TO NOS Items per unit decimal 6 digits Issue in inventory Qty
entry.content:
Our Customer have requirement of Purchasing Items in KGs and Inventory will be Nos and they want to issue to production as Nos.We are using UOM Group definition to achieve this 1Nos=54 Kgs so Item per unit is taking in system automatically as 0.018519 6 digits but our Qty decimal is 5 digits 

But the system is taking the conversion in nos as 3.92603 decimal for below scenario we tried to change decimal of qty to 6 digits but it remains same

 

PO
Item NoQtyUOM
TUBE260kGS
GRPO
Item NoQtyUOM
TUBE212kGS

We want to round off this to 4 Nos since we cant use in decimal value to production.

Please provide solution for the above scenario and advise us how to handle this in SAP B1

entry.title: Re: Custom Business Configuration
entry.content: @Attila I tried this in S/4 HANA 2023 On prem. Im able to generate the App successfully. I have used DCL to control the data flow from my base CDS and working fine when i run the app. But the problem is when i try to edit the data it is bypassing my DCL and displaying all the records from the table due to draft functionality. Is it possible to skip the draft function while generating the app? if not how to control the data flow when we use the Edit option along with draft?

entry.title: Re: Custom Business Configuration
entry.content: @Arvind_A  We can comment the TR validation and mandatory check code in the behavior implementation class after generating the app. i have tried this and working successfully. When we create or change data, it is not asking for any TR.

entry.title: What is the reason for Daily WS to automatically change from 1234 to 4231?
entry.content:
We have built a WSR for specific employees with Daily WS '1234' shift time 1330-2300 however, upon checking it suddenly changed to '4321' shift time 1300-2300. We are definitely sure the requirements is '1234' and has been inputted accordingly. It only happened on a number of week, like Week 7, Week 9  and Week 10 of 30 Weeks roster.

Is there a way to found out why it suddenly changed?

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: SAP TCODES USAGE BY USERS
entry.content:
Hi,

@ky2820 check SM20 - Analysis of Security Audit Log

Regards

entry.title: What's the major difference between odata and S/4hana Conection in SAP Analytics cloud?
entry.content: I am trying to access a custom CDS view on the S/4HANA public cloud using SAC. I noticed that both OData and S/4HANA connections can be used to access the custom CDS view. Could someone explain the differences between these two methods? Also, which method is generally recommended for accessing custom CDS views?

entry.title: Multiple duplicate records founds while creating sqvi report
entry.content:
Hi,

I created mapping in sqvi tables are VBRK, VBRP, VBAP, VBFA, MARC,MARA  getting multiple records found please suggest me which table link to get unique data.

entry.title: What is the difference between Normal ATP and Advanced ATP
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

                  We have created stock transfer order with quantity of 150 KG and committed quantity is 120 KG (Available stock 20 KG + two inbound deliveries 60 KG and 40 KG respectively)

                 Outbound delivery is created for 20 qty based on available stock later we have received 60 KG goods recipient from inbound delivery 1. Total available stock is 80 KG.

                  Now we need to change the outbound delivery quantity from 20 KG to 80 KG. But we are getting the following pop error message at the time of delivery quantity changes (Error: Only 60 KG of material ZTATP22 available Message No. VL 150)

Note: Here we are trying to change the outbound delivery quantity but system considering same delivery quantity as open while run the ATP check    Available quantity = Total available stock – Same outbound delivery (80 -20= 60KG). Our requirement is system should consider the Same outbound delivery quantity also while calculating the available stock.

Analysis:

                     The same scenario we have checked with traditional ATP where system allow us to change the outbound delivery quantity up to total available stock (80KG)

  • In advanced ATP check system is not allowing us to change the outbound delivery quantity up to the available stock.
  • In Normal ATP system is allow us to change the outbound delivery quantity up to the available stock.

Requirement:

                                We need to update or change the outbound delivery quantity based on total available stock.

 

I would like to know what the differences in AATP and Normal ATP in terms of functionality. Why AATP is not considered the editable outbound delivery quantity.

 

Thanks in advance,

Nagaraj

entry.title: Re: Getting error as CO object not found
entry.content:
Hi @jithendrashiva 

You may want to check if the sender and receiver objects have a validity for the period in which the allocation is being run. This is the most common reason for this error message.

Thanks & Regards

Sanil Bhandari

entry.title: Re: Norwegian-registered foreign business
entry.content:
Hi,

in BP you can also assign a VAT number of another country.

 

Kind regards

Robert

entry.title: Re: Getting error as CO object not found
entry.content:
Hi sanilbhandari

Have checked they are in active status

Thanks

Jithendra Shivashankar

Need to know which App or CDS view to use to get a report to see the change logs for business partners, customer, suppliers and associated master. This requirement came from Auditors


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Change log for customer, vendor, and associate master...
entry.content: Use the APP Maintain Business Partner and the path is Menu --> Extras --> Change History

entry.content:
Hi Cas,

check out this SAP note below

3347947 - Shared Folder Permissions Are Restricted When Upgrading SAP Business One from 10.0 FP 2208 or Lower to FP 2305 - SAP for Me

entry.title: Re: I could not find CDS view for tax code in public cloud
entry.content:
Dear Sivasankaran,

Kindly try if CDS I_TaxCode could fulfill your requirements.

Best regards,

Angela

entry.title: Re: I want to select all entries coming in my RAP applica...
entry.content:
Hi AR77,

The selectAll property mentioned in https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/sdk/#/topic/116b5d82e8c545e2a56e1b51b8b0a9bd might be what you are looking for.

From my understanding by default only the loaded data is selected. This is done for performance reasons, especially when dealing with large amounts of data.

However, you can change this behavior by setting the selectAll property to true in your table configuration.

If you are developing your UI in Business Application Studio you could also try to use the Guided Development feature for the same.

Best regards,
Peter

entry.title: Re: Copy plant configuration SAP DMC
entry.content:
Hi @IGHADEN_Ayoub1 ,

currently, that's not possible. However it's a roadmap item https://roadmaps.sap.com/board?range=CURRENT-LAST&PRODUCT=73555000100800001492&q=configuration#Q3%202024;INNO=000D3AAADBCE1EEBB1AB4BFC73441C37

Any other ways in your thoughts, please?

Stalin

entry.title: SAP Stammtisch Munich
entry.content:
Brought to you by SAP Community members, the SAP Stammtisch is an informal meetup everyone can participate: SAP users, developers, consultants and architects - come and join us and bring a friend.

If you want to join, please register here.

*Please note that this event entry is a summarized version of the original event and your registration may be required by the organizer shared on the original event website. RSVP accuracy here is without guarantee and does not constitute registration. However, if you want to earn an SAP Community badge, please leave your RSVP here as well.

entry.title: Re: Custom Business Configuration
entry.content:
Hi there,

Thanks for sharing insightful information. So far I felt and we were were used BRF+ tables replacement of SM30 .

But this will give more boost up to developers. 

Such a great job, nice.

🙂

entry.title: Re: item code being replace to nearest item from item mas...
entry.content:
Hi Tan Su Hsiang,

This is system behavior, and cannot be turned off. If the customer has items ABC, DEF, ABF and DEC, typing in DE will open a list with DEF and DEC, for the user to choose from. If the customer has only ABC and DEF, then the system will automatically assume that DE means item DEF. This system only works from left to right. That means that when the user types in EF the system will not show DEF.

"Customer is using copy table"

Do you mean, for example, from Excel to SAP Business One? In this case copying only a partial value like AB from Excel and pasting it into SAP Business One, will not work reliably. The source values should be complete, i.e. ABC or DEF.

For items an alternative is to use barcodes / EAN codes, if the Excel tables contains this information.

Regards,

Johan

entry.title: SAP Signavio Process Managerでべスプラのフローを改良してみる
entry.content:
0. はじめに


Signavioについて詳しく知る機会があり、このツールは便利だなと思ったので学んだことをOutputします。
S/4HANAの導入は、昨今はお客さんのAs-Isの業務ベースではなくSAP Best Practiceベースで導入することが増えてきました。
とはいえBest Practiceの流れをそのまま加工することなくお客さんにFitできるわけでもなく、多少の変更は不可避と言えます。そうすると必然的にBest Practiceのフローを編集する必要があります。Best PracticeはBPMN形式でExportが可能ですが、Exportしたファイルをツールで加工できればよいのにと思っていました。

このブログでは、SAPのBest PracticeのフローをSignavio Process ManagerにImportして見栄えを改良してみようと思います。

 

1. SAP Signavioとは

ビジネスプロセスを管理するための仕組みです。プロセスマイニングツールと呼ばれるものです。

業務プロセスをマイニングする（採掘する）ことでボトルネックになっている部分を発見することを主眼としています。

BTPのBuildやIntegration Suite等と同じように、複数の機能をひとまとめにしたSuite Solutionで、Suite製品としての名称は"SAP Signavio Process Transformation Suite"です。


以下の機能から構成されます。

  • Process Insight
  • Process Intelligence
  • Process Manager
  • Journey Modeler
  • Process Governance

SAP導入コンサルタントがSignavioを触ると、まずはProcess Managerから深堀りすることになるでしょう。
プロセスフローは、プロジェクトが導入であれ保守であれ最も重要度の高く馴染みのあるドキュメントの一つだからです。

2. SAP Best PracticeからSignavioにフローをImportする

まずはSAP for MEからBest PracticeのフローをExportしてみましょう。

お手持ちのS-IDでSAP for MEにログインします。

↓”Signavio Process navigator”と検索してアクセスします。

Signavio Process navigatorでBest Practiceを探しましょう。

今回は、Sourcing and Procurementで最もスタンダードな「J45 - Procurement of Direct Materials」を使います。

↓Signavio Process navigatorの検索窓で"J45"と入力します。

↓国やEdition, versionごとに表示されます。今回は、Private Cloud版の2022を選択します。

↓ExportのアイコンからBPMNを選択します。

↓拡張子bpmn2のファイルをDLできます。

Signavio(Free Trial版で良いです)にログインします。

最初にCollaboration Hubの画面が開くと思うので、右上の9点リーダー(?)からProcess Managerを選択。

↓Signavio Process ManagerのExploror画面が開くので、画面上部のImport/Export>Import BPMN 2.0XMLを選択します。

ちなみにBest Practiceを取り込むにはZipファイルとbpmnファイルの形式がありますが、Free Trial版ではbpmnファイルしか無理みたいです。

さっきLocalに落としたbpmnファイルをImportします。

↓フローをImportできたので開いてみます。

SAP for MEで閲覧したBest Practiceと同じフローを閲覧・編集できます。

 

 

3.  SAP Signavio Process Managerでフローを編集する

ここからフローを編集していきます。

3-1. システムのふるまいをレーンに分ける

さて、BPMN記法の場合、レーンに表現するのは基本的には人（ロールまたは組織）のふるまいですが、
SAP導入で作る業務フローではシステムの動きも一つのレーンに表現する傾向にあります。
特にSAPが外部とのシステムとバックグラウンドでIFしているような場合には、SAP-外部システムのふるまいをフローに表現したくなると思います。

BPMN記法のフローではそうした表現はあまり見ませんが、わかりやすさを重視するのであればそうしても問題ないと思います。

↓プールにスイムレーンを追加し、Main Attribute>Nameを"S/HANA"にします。

このレーンにDataObject>Data Store(よくあるドラム缶マーク)を置いて、伝票を登録するタスクから点線をつなぐことで、伝票登録によってできるデータを明確にします。

後述するCustom Attributeとどちらを活かしてもよいですが、仕訳が発生するタスクにはText Annotationで仕訳も表現してみました。

また、バックグラウンド処理は人のレーンではなくS/4HANAレーンに置くことで、「人が操作しているのではない」ということが一目でわかるようになります。

3-2. 仕訳とFioriAppIDを記述する。

自動仕訳はSAP導入のフローで表現する要素としては重要になります。そのためタスクのいずれかのAttributeに記述したいところなのですが、標準のAttributeには仕訳を入力する専用のものがありません。

なのでカスタムのAttributeを作ってそこに仕訳の情報を書きましょう。

一旦フローの編集画面からExplororに戻って、そこからSetup>Define Notations/attributesを選択します。

↓Modeling Language>Business Process Diagram(BPMN2.0) > Diagram Element Type>Task > Custom AttributesでAddを選択

↓こんな感じでAttributeを作成します。仕訳の貸借を表現するため、2 Colmnあるテーブル形式にしてみました。

↓仕訳が発生するタスクを開いて、登録したAttributeから仕訳を登録します。

あともう一つのCustom Attributeとして、FioriAppIDないしTCodeを作ってあげます。

(BPMNファイルに含まれてて、BestPracticeのフローをImportすれば勝手に入ってくれたらいいのになと思っていましたが、そこまではできないみたいです。)

↓こんな感じでSingle LineのテキストのAttirbuteを作ってFioriAppIDを入れ込んでみました。

 

3-3. 帳票やML等の表現

標準のJ45のフローでは、取引先とやりとりする帳票およびそれを送受信する媒体も表現されていなかったので、Data Objectから帳票のアイコンを出して「メールで帳票を仕入先に送付している」ことを表現してみました。

3-4. オンライン処理/バックグラウンド処理の表現

標準のTaskはAttributeのTaskTypeが"User"ですが、バックグラウンド処理は"Service"にしてあげることで、人とシステムの区別を明確にします。

 

3-5. タスクの追加・削除

必要に応じて、

  • 伝票の取り消しや修正をするタスク
  • レポートを参照するタスク（例えば発注伝票を登録する前に発注が必要であることを確認するために在庫のレポートを確認する）
  • 登録後に伝票を確認するタスク

等を登録または不要なら削除していきましょう。

今回は、発注登録する前に在庫数は確認するレポートを参照するタスクを追加してみました。

 

4. できあがったフローはこんな感じ！

↓Exploreの画面でPDF出力が可能です。

下に流れていく(Vertical)か 横に流れていく(Horizontal)はお好みだけど、今回は横に流れていくパターンで作ってみました。

ただPDFだとAttributeが見られないので使いづらいですよね。SignavioがWebのツールなので、フローの閲覧もツールでやった方がよいかと思います。

Exproreの画面からShare>Publish to SAP Disnavio Process Collaboration Hubを選択します。

 

次の画面でPublishすると、Exploror画面で地球のマークが確認できます。

こうすることで、Collaboration Hub側でフローを閲覧可能になります。

 

タスクをクリックすることでAttributeの値もすべて閲覧することができます。

長いテキスト属性も問題なく表示できるUIとなっているので、エクセルでフローを作っていた時のようにタスクの説明が長くなってしまったがためにフローの見た目を調整する、みたいな無駄な作業が無くなりますね。

もしSignavioで作ったフローで導入時のプロセス説明を行うのであれば、ファイルをExportするのではなくCollaboration Hubの画面で説明したほうがわかりやすいのかなと思いました。

 

5. 業務プロセス記述書をExportしてみる


作成したフローおよびタスクに記述したAttributeを、プロセス記述書としてExportすることができます。

 


タスクの属性を、プロセスフローと同じシステムで管理できるのは便利ですよね。

↓エクスポートしたファイルはこんな感じです。

 

このままだと体裁が味気ないので整えたいですよね。
テンプレートの編集ができるようですが、残念ながらトライアル版では対象外のようです。

またテンプレートを編集できたとしても、機械的にWordにエクスポートしたファイルだと、資料の細部にこだわりを要求する日本のお客さんにはどうしてもうけいれてもらえない可能性もあると思います。
そのため、プロセスフロー自体はSignavioで記述して、タスクの説明・仕訳やシステム連携の仕様についてはWordで管理するのも手だと思います。
プロセスフローさえあれば、ProcessInsightで行うような分析はできる（はずな）ので。

6. まとめ

SAP Best PracticeのフローをSignavioで加工する流れを解説しました。

無料トライアルでもそれなりのことができるので、ぜひ使ってみてください。

entry.title: Re: SAP eDocument installation
entry.content: @martinlitalin: Thank you for your quick response. Could you please confirm if it's possible to purchase the E-Invoicing solution license separately, or if it's necessary to acquire the entire DRC solution?

entry.title: Re: BI Commentary Application - DB and schema?
entry.content:
I am not sure what exactly you are referring to when you say "schema". I realized that depending on which database you are using, "schema" can have different meanings in the architecture. For Oracle databases, what i am using mostly, the schema is more or less the same as the user you use to connect to the database.

But this may be a help: 

  • To find out which schema the Auditing Database is using (and then the default commentary config), just check in CMC - Auditing.
  • BO uses JDBC to talk to the commentary database - the "Connection Name" contains the connection string for JDBC that itself also contains the schema name, depending on the underlying database
  • BO does not create a schema (in terms of database user for oracle), you need to set that up in the database itself (it must have the rights to create tables) and configure the connection in the CMC
  • There is one table COMMENTARY_MASTER that is created by BO when you setup commentary application, nothing to do on your side

My experience is that it is the easiest way to just use the Auditing database for commentary. There is no effort on your side to set it up and when it comes to troubleshooting it is also way easier to manage that.

entry.title: Re: Task 2141 - Calculate Grp Shares % (PL30) does not sh...
entry.content: Thank you for your response,

entry.title: SAP Integration Suite Monthly Webinar - June 2024
entry.content:
SAP Integration Suite is SAP’s strategic integration platform. It helps simplify integration by connecting people, processes, data, and devices worldwide while supporting a wide variety of integration approaches. You can take advantage of our out-of-the-box integration features for SAP integrations or use the Integration Suite to accelerate end-to-end integration scenarios across heterogeneous and hybrid landscapes.

In this webcast, we will have two sections:
Product Updates, where we share updates on key capabilities and latest enhancements released for SAP Integration Suite.

OR
#AskAnythingIntegration: Our panel of experts will answer any questions you have on integration.

Link to Event

entry.title: Outbound POSC: Final loading WT not getting generated automatically
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I have configured POSC for outbound but WT for final step is not getting generated. Attached are my config steps. I completed picking, packing at WC and movement to staging.

(I read one blog for expert where it is not recommended to have load task automatic but this is technically possible). Please advise.

Regards

entry.title: Re: SAP PROJECT SYSTEM (PS)
entry.content: Thank you @sammar81 . Can you please help me with the basics of PS like coding mask and length, Easy cost planning etc.? it would be very kind of you.

entry.title: SAP Customer Checkout
entry.content:
I wanted to bring to your attention a challenge we encountered during customer checkout.

For example, if the exchange rate is 1 USD = 89500 LBP and the receipt invoice is valued at 3 USD. The client paid 100 USD and requested the CCO user to pay out 50 USD and the remaining amount in LBP.

However, in CCO, the payout can only be done in one currency. What do you suggest as a solution for this issue?

entry.title: How to display custom data in the custom section of fiori list report object page?
entry.content: How to display custom data in the custom section of fiori list report object page, I've one requirement where i need I'm doing formatting with data and need to display in the custom section of the object page in list report fiori application.

entry.title: Re: Modern Regular Expressions in ABAP – Part 2 – Migrating from POSIX to PCRE
entry.content:
Hi,

in my point of understanding a regular expressions can be seen to describe a crowd of words, ie.

A-.(A|F) contains all terms beginning with character A followed by a hyphen, having one character/number and ands up with a A or F: A-1A, A-3F.
But how to test 2 regex for interesection? A-.(B|F) for example. 

How can i test, that A-.(B|F) and A-.(A|F) describes at least one common term?

Best regards
Stefan

entry.title: Re: Robosapiens and SAPGUI Library in Robot Framework: At...
entry.content:
Hello @AutomationTester,

as far as I can see is the path of your ID not complete.

In your case:

 

wnd[0]/usr/subSCREEN_1:SAPLIQS0:1060/txtVIQMEL-QMTXT

 

In my case:

 

wnd[0]/usr/subSCREEN_1:SAPLIQS0:1060/subNOTIF_TYPE:SAPLIQS0:1061/txtVIQMEL-QMTXT

 

The field txtVIQMEL-QMTXT is part of a GuiSimpleContainer and this must be part of the ID. I assume that is what you are missing.

But please analyze your path before to see whether it is identical or possibly different.

Best regards
Stefan

entry.title: Re: SAP Customer Checkout - Billing localization for Port...
entry.content:
Hallo CJoubert

In the standard we do not support Portugal localization. But our partners have already done that. We recommend that you collaborate.

Here is the link to the trust
https://community.sap.com/t5/crm-and-cx-blogs-by-members/sap-customer-checkout-localization-for-portugal/ba-p/13531536

Hope it helps.

If your question in answered correctly, kindly select the answer as "Right Answer". This helps others to follow and easily locate answers.

Best Regards,
Bikash Bansal

This is a really great enhancement to the SAC and SAP Companion connection, thank you! 
Is this something that is also working for Datasphere - or is it something that is on the roadmap for the future?

entry.title: In Infotype 21, overview of records is displaying truncated value in First name field.How to resolve
entry.content:
Hi  friends

Can you help me to identify this issue in infotype 21 ( Family details). I am able to update the records successfully. But the display shows a truncated value in the overview section. Pl. help to resolve it.

In PA30 screen, I am updating the values successfully.

The same value is not getting displayed in overview of records

The field length is 40

Thanks in advance

 

Regards

Raghu

entry.title: SAP Certification
entry.content:
I am writing this post for two main reasons. This is with regard to the SAP Certification exams held in India.

  1. Based on my personal experience, I would like to warn all potential SAP certification candidates to be careful when applying for the exam in India. I attended a 4-month course and appeared for the SAP-Certified Associate-Back-end-Developer-ABAP Cloud exam on 30th May 2024. I had also studied using a sample paper after double and cross-checking all the answers from trustworthy sources including the SAP help portal and SAP community. So I was very well-versed in the questions and answers of the sample paper which was the exact same paper set by the SAP certification board. So imagine my shock when I got only 56% in the exam which I was sure to pass with a minimum percentage of 90% or more. When I asked them to show me my answer sheet and how they graded it, there was just deathly silence at their end. Still awaiting their response. Please note that the exam fees are quite expensive for many who just want to get a job or a promotion to take care of their families. I would also like to inform the candidates that the proctors are clueless on how to guide a candidate using IOS.
  2. The second important reason for posting this is to request whoever is globally responsible for SAP Certifications to please make the whole process transparent and ethical.

entry.title: Re: How we can top up gift cards in Sap Customer Checkout
entry.content:
Hallo Tharindu 

You need to scan the gift card ID again. The system recognizes that this is a Gift Card of type "Top-up" and show you the option to top-up or redeem. Hope it helps.

If your question in answered correctly, kindly select the answer as "Right Answer". This helps others to follow and easily locate answers.

 

Best Regards,
Bikash Bansal
Product Owner, SAP Customer Checkout

entry.title: Re: SAP TCODES USAGE BY USERS
entry.content: Create an ABAP program to extract ST03 data and then it's an easy query. Official function modules SWNC_*. Note that you need to query also data from the past, so you'll have to retrieve the archived files...

entry.title: Preliminary What’s New Information for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2402.4
entry.content:
Preliminary versions of What’s New information and of the Product Assistance are now available for customers and partners to get a preview on the upcoming new and changed features of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2402.4.

You can find this preview on the current Help Portal page SAP S/4HANA Cloud (see What’s New section “Preview of SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2402.4”). To access the Preliminary What’s New information, please use the What’s New Viewer or the Release Assessment and Scope Dependency (RASD) tool.

The RASD tool provides you with a personalized and tailored view on What’s New information based on the activated and used scope within your system. The preliminary information for SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2402.4 will be available in RASD within the next few days. We recommend using RASD to prepare for upgrades and updates of your system and to focus on the new and changed features that are relevant for you.

A valid S-User ID is needed to use the RASD tool and to view all the preliminary content stated above.

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to change setting of list report filter?
entry.content:
Which UI5 version are you using?

There was an issue with Valuelists in 1.124.0 which limited the response to 10 items, which has been fixed in 1.124.1 to show 100 items. This has been released yesterday.

entry.title: Re: I want to select all entries coming in my RAP applica...
entry.content: Thanks for your reply but I am not using BAS platform, I want to put the code in Behaviour Implementation Class only

entry.title: Basics of Nodejs and Expressjs in SAP BAS
entry.content:
A very basic of initialising node and express in SAP BAS project.

  1. Create a full stack dev space. Lets call it “node”.

 

2. Open the dev space. Create empty folder “nodebasics1” in workspace.

3. Right click and open integrated terminal.

 

4. Run the first command “npm init”. This is the very first command to be executed when setting up any node project.

 

5. After executing command, it will ask few details on package name, licence, description, author, entry point(starting file), etc. Provide the details if required, else, press keep pressing enter.

 

 

6. After this, a package.json file is created. This will have all the details , as mentioned in step 5.  We can change anytime later.

 

7. Now install Express package using command “npm install express”.

 

 

8. Once downloaded, you will notice below changes in project structure and package.json

 

9. Since the mail file is index.js, right click on project “nodebasics1”, and create a new file named as “index.js”.

 

 

 

 

 

10. Copy the code from https://www.npmjs.com/package/express and paste it in index.js.

 

 

 

11. Now execute the command “node .” [Notice the space in between node and .]

 

 12. Possibility of error here, “Port is already in use”.

 

 

If an error comes, change the port number. I am changing it to 3004 for now. Execute node . again.

 

 

13. Once executed successfully, a pop up in bottom right corner will come. Open in new tab.

 

 

 

14. To change the message or any changes, stop the server by closing the tab and executing Ctrl+C in integrated terminal. When Ctrl C is executed, it will show as ^C.

 

 15. Change the message and execute again with node . .

 

16. Open the server.

 

 

Welcome

entry.title: Re: error on using "case" instead of "if" with "Applicati...
entry.content:
The switch statement in JavaScript uses strict equality check (see https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/JavaScript/Reference/Statements/switch#description). Therefore, the expression in the switch and case clause must be of same type. "getActivePage" returns the active page object so you need to compare with a page object not a string. From your question I can't see where e.g. "Page_KPI" comes from.

For me both options are working, see below. However, there are two constraints:

1. This sample only works in a script on page 2, because you can only access the current active page. Maybe someone else has a recommendation or trick to work around that. Unfortunately there seems to be no method to get the page name which would be one option to avoid the reference to the other page object.

2. In the switch case the page in case must be a local variable (here "other_page"). This seems to be a bug.

 

var activePage = Application.getActivePage();
var otherPage = Page_2;

if (activePage == otherPage) {
	console.log("if-yes");
} else {
	console.log("if-no");
}

switch(activePage) {
        // only works with local variables (seems to be a bug)
	case otherPage:
		console.log("switch-yes");
		break;
	default:
		console.log("switch-no");
		break;
}

entry.title: Premium Hub CoE – Workflow in SAP Transportation Management Docs
entry.content:
Many times we get this requirement, where Business want TM docs should get approval while changing of a resource, Charge Amount Changes, Removal of some items from the document.

We ( Varsha, Sanjeev ) from COE India Team have developed a simple Workflow example to cater these use cases for some customers and want to share with you so that you can also do the same.

Our Example is very simple, Freight Order will be on block status on creation and when approved, it will remove the Block from Freight Order.

When  Freight order is created, We are setting Freight Order in execution block, It will sends notification to approve to remove Freight execution block.

To achieve this once Freight Order set up is ready create workflow and trigger workflow during FO creation as explained below .

  1. Set FO Block on FO creation

 

 

 

 

 

  1. To set FO execution block -> By creating instance of /SCMTMS/CL_BLOCK_MANAGER_TOR and adding entry for execution block with block category – Manual block during FO creation
  2. Trigger Workflow -> Trigger workflow during FO creation after setting FO block.

Trigger workflow using CL_SWF_EVT_EVENT=> RAISE based on workflow event class - ZCL_ZTK_WF_TOR_APPR

 

 

 

  1. Workflow set up for approval and remove FO block

 

 

 

 

Step 1 – Decision to Remove Execution block on FO, by passing agents as user who intiates Workflow, here we can add agents role, org unit etc

 

 

Considering standard decision Task as requirement is only to approve or reject. if more information like comments to be added then create Custom task and make changes accordingly

 

 

 

 

Step 2 . Based on Decision to remove FO execution blank , remove Blocking form FO

 

Create Workflow task by passing Object type and Method which actually removes FO execution block by calling /SCMTMS/TOR Root Level action – OVERRULE_BLOCK

 

 

 

Execution

  1. Once FO is created and Saved, Execution Block is set with Block category – Manual block

 

 

 

  1. Workflow is trigger for FO which is created - 6100000750

 

 

  1. Accept the Workflow notification for FO created

 

 

  1. Freight Order Execution Block is overruled and , Execution is not blocked anymore

entry.title: Fiori LaunchPad get error when launching
entry.content:
I get below error after login to Fiori Launchpad, this message come from sap.base.ManagedObject-dbg.js, i don't find any same case of this in community. Can expert help me solve this. 
UI5 version: 1.120.0


error: Defining the object type ('sap.m.PageAccessibleLandmarkInfo') via its string name is deprecated, since it leads to accesses to the global namespace. The object type either stems from an explicitly given 'Type' value or was inferred from the default aggregation type. Please require the respective object type module beforehand. For control development, please also refer to the runtime metadata property 'defaultClass', which allows you to specify a default aggregation class type via constructor reference.

entry.title: NEW Concur’s Technical Document Portal
entry.content:
Hello all. I have been working as a Technical Consultant at SAP Concur for several years, and I understand the challenges our customers and partners face in finding essential technical documentation for their interface development work, which is often located in different places. To address this issue, we have created a centralized hub called Concur’s Technical Document portal.

Whether you are a seasoned veteran in Concur development or just starting out, our Technical Document Portal provides easy access to a wide range of resources, including information on SSO and SFTP connections, flat file specs and toolkits, available web services APIs, and important setup guides and FAQs for use with all aspects of your SAP ICS integration.

Probably, you won’t need all the listed resources for your Concur implementation, but the aim is that you find the main resources and starting points for your technical scope on the portal.

Key features of our Technical Document Portal include:

  1. Connecting to Concur:  Find all the information you need to establish your SFTP, SSO, or web services connections with Concur. 
  2. Interface Documentation: Dive into our in-depth technical documentation, which covers different areas of interface development including flat file integrations, web services APIs, and prebuilt SAP integrations.
  3. Best Practices: Find links to step-by-step guides, and a number of blog posts related to recent developments and best practices around your interface development work with Concur, written by our Expert Technical Consultants. 

I am confident that Concur’s Technical Document Portal can help anyone working on the technical aspects of Concur implementation.

entry.title: Re: Concerning login timeout in SAP DM
entry.content:
Hello Mr. Migliore,

you do not need necessarily to increase the timeout , but it would not have any negative impact.
Except  security complains, as the session is longer useable.

You can also teach the users (who were logged out) to use the Refresh Session feature here:

entry.title: Re: Workflow for Transportation Documents like Freight Order, Freight Settlement and Freight Booking
entry.content: Hello Rohit, thanks for sharing! This is indeed common requirement.

entry.title: 1MV Cash Application Machine Learning Model - How to get 5,000-10,000 cleared payments in one Model
entry.content:
Dear Sir or Madam,

The following question has arisen when using machine learning to post-process the bank statement.

This documentation https://me.sap.com/notes/0003001671 is pointing out that 5,000 -10,000 cleared payments must be available in order to train the ML model sufficiently.

To do this, we carry out the following steps:

  1. ML_CASH_APP_JOB_STATUS_DP and set status to “In Progress” (P_INPROG)
  2. ML_CASH_APP_DATA_POST to extract training data
  3. ML_CASH_APP_JOB_STATUS_DP and set status to “Complete” (P_COMPL) -> This will trigger training in cloud

The Model Manager for SAP Cash Application can now be found in the BTP Cockpit:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_CASH_APPLICATION/9668f05979b644cd960f0d83ae4ed0aa/73fd86f7258b46bf84ef47f415af18fa.html?locale=en-US

When steps 1 to 3 are executed, a new inactive model is created. With regard to the processed items, the statistics show that not all cleared payments from the ERP are processed cumulatively. We can recognize this by the number of items when we run this training job every month. The number does not accumulate. In addition, each training run creates a new model that must then be activated.

How are we supposed to obtain an ML model that has generated 5,000-10,000 cleared payments if each training run only processes a part or new cleared payments and then generates a new model on this basis?

Who can explain this in detail?

Thank you very much
Sebastian

entry.title: Re: Event Recap: "Conversational AI with SAP Signavio and SAP Joule" by the SAP Experience

entry.title: Third party delivery process for subcontracting raw material at S4HC
entry.content:
Dear all,

I would like to know how to operate the third party delivery process for subcontracting material (raw material) and goods recipt finished goods in S4HC.

Is there any note or communty page?

It seems that user can delivery raw material directly in ECC and S4 HANA Private edition.
When they create PO, they enter the vendor in Delivery Address Tab and check "SC supp" using ME21N.
After that they delivery raw material to SC vendor and goods recipt finished goods from them.

Could you tell us the operation in case third party delivery raw material?

And I find third party delivery finished goods is not supported in S4HC.
Is this still correct?
https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/third-party-subcontracting/qaq-p/12815885

Best regards,

The key point you've missed is that you need to modify/extend the table with logic that handles the refresh. This includes adding the Refresh property.

entry.title: Re: Problem -Unable to call protected app from another App.

entry.title: Re: Premium Hub CoE – DSC Knowledge Bits Series
entry.content: Great work Rohit!!

entry.title: Re: manage RFQ app error. Follow-on doc. is inconsistent....
entry.content:
Hello Together,

In order to use a different RFQ type  you will have to configure as well the Supplyer quotation document type.

the RFQ type must match the Supplier quotation doc type.

For EX: Standard we have RFQ doc type RQ and We want to configure a new type SA. We create a copy by RQ and assign the "Allowed item categories and Link to Purchase requisitions.

SPRO> IMG> Material Management> Purchasing > Sourcing > Define document types for RFQ.

 

Next step is to configure the corresponding Doc type for Supplier quotation.

SPRO> IMG> Material Management> Purchasing > Sourcing > Define Document Types for Supplier Quotations.

Here we create a copy by RQ and give the same type as above in our case SA and after we are configuring the follow on doc categories and types.

Next step is to allow the Document categories and types:

SPRO> IMG> Material Management> Purchasing > Sourcing > Blockchain Enablement > Allowed Document Categories and Types.

Here we create a new entry for doc category R and Doc type SA.

 

Now you will be able to see the follow on documents for the RFQ type SA in Manage RFQ app and create supplier quotations.

 

Regards,

Teo.

entry.title: Re: Import Rejection Summary no longer an option in SAC
entry.content:
Hello @Susanne_Helbig,

it seems you are involved in this topic?

Are you aware about these two notes, which describe the same issue: https://me.sap.com/notes/3457894/ and https://me.sap.com/notes/3474712/ ...

I myself and some of my customers are having tremendous trouble currently, since they cannot see which records got rejected and why! It is almost 6 weeks and we still cannot see any solution.

Could you please trigger somebody responsible?

For a Cloud product we expect a faster solution!

Thank you very much!

Martin

entry.title: Re: Why SAP killed Appgyver and made everything worse?

entry.title: Is there any way to embed a program or transaction into another program?
entry.content:
hello everyone：

I have a requirement, that is, the user wants to be able to call other programs (multiple) in a program, and can display the input screen and output results of the calling program in a certain area of the current program, such as sub-screens and container controls. It is a bit similar to SE90. The content displayed by se90 is basically fixed content. What I want is to display the initial screen of the transaction according to different transactions, and display the output results of the transaction after execution.

entry.title: Distribution based on dynamic weights using #Variablemembers in SAC
entry.content:
I am trying to distribute some values using a data action, in this example of Plan 2023 from an unassigned member, to the members of Product A and Product B of Product Dimension. I want the distribution to be based on the weight of Products of the Actuals of 2023. For simplicity I differentiate the Actuals and Plan using a dimension called "value type" (Actuals have the value 010 and Plan the 020).

I tried applying the following code:

//Define the membersets

MEMBERSET [d/Product]=("Product A","Product B")

MEMBERSET [d/Date].[p/YEAR]="2023"

MEMBERSET [d/Company_Code]="Company A"

MEMBERSET [d/Value_Type]=("020")

//Define variables

VARIABLEMEMBER #Weight OF [d/Product]

VARIABLEMEMBER #SumProduct OF [d/Product]

// Step 1: Calculate Total Actuals for 2023

DATA([d/Product]=#SumProduct)=RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures]="Measure",

   [d/Version]="public.Actual",

   [d/Value_Type]="010",

   [d/Date]="2023",

   [d/Company_Code]="Company A")

//Step 2: Calculate Distribution Weights

FOREACH [d/Product]

DATA([d/Measures]="Measure", [d/Product]=#Weight)=RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures]="Measure",

   [d/Version]="public.Actual",

   [d/Value_Type]="010",

   [d/Date]="2023",

   [d/Company_Code]="Company A")

/ RESULTLOOKUP([d/Product]=#SumProduct)                                

ENDFOR

//Step 3: Distribute the values

DATA()=RESULTLOOKUP([d/Product]="#",

[d/Version]="public.Actual",

[d/Value_Type]="020",

[d/Date]="2023",

[d/Company_Code]="Company A")

* RESULTLOOKUP([d/Product]=#Weight)

//Step 4: Delete the data from "Unassigned" after the distribution

DATA([d/Date]="2023",[d/Product]="#",[d/Value_Type]="020")=0

Do you have any suggestions?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Problem when binding CAP application with PostgreSQL,...
entry.content:
Hi Edoardo,

I'm not quite sure if you can change the db but we did manage to re-use a single db in multiple CAP applications by specifying the schema in the pool configuration. You can potentially change the db in there as well?

We specify the schema in the package.json "cds" config as follows:

"requires": {
  "db": {
    "credentials": {
      "schema": "yourschemaname"
    }
  }
}

Note: cds.requires.db has a "pool" property as well, you could check that too.

Best
Martin

entry.title: Re: FTXP Maintain Tax Rates - Do we have Data migration c...
entry.content:
Hello,

in case you miss some migration objects for SAP S/4HANA, you have 2 possiblities:

1. Create your own migration object - find details on data migration landing page  http://help.sap.com/S4_OP_DM - section TRAINING MATERIAL - Migration Object Modeler, e.g.  Create new migration object 

2. Open a request in Customer Influence Portal https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/campaign/3610 - Details can be found in SAP Note 3428165      

Best regards, Sybille Lackermeier, SAP S/4HANA migration cockpit Product Management

entry.title: Re: SAP GEF Action Configuration
entry.content:
Hi Christof,

Create an action ID for this activity.

Description: Create Notification

Action Type: Fiori Launchpad

Geo Object Action Content:#MaintenanceNotification-create

With this config, you can able to create Notifications from the Equipment on the map ( passing the Notification Type and Tech Object to the notification transaction).

 

All the Best

G.Kanaka Rao

entry.title: cloud-cap-samples-java not starting locally
entry.content:
Hi,
I cloned the main branch of cloud-cap-samples-java  (https://github.com/sap-samples/cloud-cap-samples-java) to my PC. Afterwards I tried to run the application locally following the instructions by running "mvn spring-boot:run" (from a VS Code terminal). The application failed to start with the error message shown in the attachment.

Any ideas on how to overcome this problem would be very welcome.

Best regards,
Axel.

P.S.: Here the output of "PS C:\Users\I023412\Fiori Elements\cloud-cap-samples-java> cds version":

@cap-js/cds-types: 0.2.0
@Sap/cds: 7.9.1
@Sap/cds-compiler: 4.9.2
@Sap/cds-dk: 7.9.2
@Sap/cds-dk (global): 7.9.2
@Sap/cds-fiori: 1.2.3
@Sap/cds-foss: 5.0.0
@Sap/cds-mtxs: 1.18.0
@Sap/eslint-plugin-cds: 3.0.3
Node.js: v20.14.0
bookshop-java: 1.0.0
home: C:\Users\I023412\AppData\Roaming pm ode_modules\@sap\cds-dk ode_modules\@sap\cds
CAP Java SDK: 2.10.0
cds4j: 2.10.0
Spring Boot: 3.2.6
Maven: 3.9.7, home: C:\Program Files\apache-maven-3.9.7-bin
Java: 17.0.11, home: C:\Program Files\SapMachine\JDK\17
OS: Windows 11, 10.0, arch: amd64

entry.title: User status update in Equipment Master based on Maintenance Orders
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have a requirement to auto update the equipment master user status to In Maintenance if any work order/Notification generate. And status should set back to Available once all open Orders  closed.

Can you please share the best way to get this change in the system? Also share any difficulties to take a note handle in this change ?

Best Regards,

Sandy

entry.title: Re: 1MV Cash Application Machine Learning Model - How to...
entry.content:
Hi Sebastian,

 

I think there is a huge misunderstanding. You should not retrain your model each month. Usually you should wait until you reached a certain size, above the limitation of an AI model, then train your model once and then you are good to go for the future. Depending on how much changes you have in your business, did you aquire new customers who do not follow your pattern of providing the information in the memo line as you need it, then you have to do a retraining again.

But in general, the idea is not to retrain each week or month. But rather try to keep it stable.

 

Best,

Edrilan Berisha

entry.title: Quality inspection before Ship notice
entry.content:
Dear Experts , 

We are implementing Quality inspection before ship notice in the system , We have followed all the steps instructed by sap Ariba for the same , the configuartion performed in sap system are 

1) Maintained the Creation of Event type linkage for Inspection lot.

2) Maintaied the change Event type linkage for inspection lot.

3)Maintained event type linkage for usage decision.

4)Maintained outbound parameter for Outbound transactions.

I am not able to generated Quality inspection request in proxy (SRT_moni) , I have put a breakout for the function module ARBCIG_EXT_EVENT_INSP_LOT_CRTD , which is responsible for creating the proxy , but it is not hitting the breakpoint. 

My thought process is , i might be missing a Output configuration as for all other document type( PO, GR , SES ,ERP SES) there is a Output process ( nace) but cannot see any Nace Configuration for Quality inspection, please let me know how i can proceed here.

Thanks & regards

Rithvik. R

EunSeok

Hi,

I want to add these red-boxed options in SAP BAS like this below screenshot to Visual Studio Code.

 

 

 

 

Does anyone know how to do it?

Regards,

Tri

entry.title: Display Change Logs - Sales Document
entry.content:
To enhance the customer experience in monitoring changes to sales documents, the Display Change Logs – Sales Documents app (F7356) is released in SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2408 to offer an overview of sales document change logs. This app integrates various types of sales document change logs. You can apply filters to view specific change logs or display all change logs directly in their system. The app also offers user-friendly change descriptions and allows you to view and analyze sales document change logs from multiple perspectives.
Prior to the introduction of this application, you may have used the "display document changes" feature to view the change logs of a specific document. However, the resulting information looks technical.

 The object page of the Manage Sales Orders - Version 2, Manage Sales Quotations - Version 2, or Manage Sales Contracts - Version 2 app also has a "Display Change Log" button. However, the button only allows you to view the change logs of a specific document.

 

App Overview

You can access the app with business role SAP_BR_INTERNAL_SALES_REP or SAP_BR_SALES_MANAGER. The app supports change types such as insertion, deletion, and modification. You can apply filters or use fuzzy search to find specific change logs that you are interested in. Each log entry contains information about a change made to a document header, item, or schedule line. You can view details such as the changed value, the person who made the change, the time of the change, and more.

 

Change Description

The app displays a change description for each log entry. You can easily tell what fields or table entries were changed from the change descriptions. So, get ready to experience a whole new level of convenience as you navigate through your change logs.

 

Comprehensive Log Details

Each log entry contains much information. In addition to the old and new field values, the log entry also includes details from sales documents. These include the sales area, sold-to party, solution order, customer reference, and sales document type. Just click on the settings icon to select the fields you want to view.

 

Filters and Fuzzy Search

This app offers an array of filters. In addition to the standard filters such as change type, changed by, and changed on, the app also offers additional filters that pertain to sales documents and allow you to further refine your search. These include the sales area, sold to party, solution order, customer reference, and sales document type. With just a click of the "adapt filters" button, you can easily select the filters that best suit your needs. You can also perform a fuzzy search by entering a document number or other attributes into the search field.

 

Authorization Control

You can maintain restrictions on the sales area, sales document type, and price element access level for relevant business roles. It helps you build different roles with different authorization requirements. For example, as for price element authorization control, the administrator can define an access level for each condition type. If your role has no read/write access to certain condition types, you may notice certain information missing in the related change logs. In the following screenshot, the entry logs a recent update to the condition type "Manual Price" in sales document 548200. Data such as the field, change description, and old and new values is missing because the user is not authorized to view such data.

entry.title: New SAP Analytics Cloud Performance Workshop
entry.content:
Attention, SAP Analytics Cloud professionals!  

 Get ready for a new SAP Analytics Cloud performance training course.  

 Boost your skills in SAP backend modeling and SAP Analytics Cloud performance story design with our specialized training course, “Backend Modeling with SAP Solutions and SAP Analytics Cloud Story Performance Optimization. “ 

This one-day training course is designed for seasoned SAP Analytics Cloud users who want to explore SAP`s strategic data modeling options and discover the relationship between story design and performance in SAP Analytics Cloud.  

You can expect to acquire basic knowledge of data modeling in SAP's central solutions, such as SAP BW/4HANA, SAP Datasphere, or SAP HANA. You will also apply story design best practices and performance analysis techniques to improve your story performance in SAP Analytics Cloud.  

 Are you curious? Book your seats for US or EMEA timezone here
